themes.reasoning_notes: Turns your creatures into 4/4 flying Sphinx tokens, often upgrading expendable bodies or token swarms into real threats.
Instant-speed exile can answer opposing creatures, though it leaves their controller a 4/4 flyer as compensation.
Exiles your own creatures to replace them with 4/4 flying Sphinx tokens, letting token or go-wide decks upgrade small bodies into meaningful evasive threats.
Can exile opposing creatures at instant speed, but the replacement 4/4 flyer makes it a situational answer rather than clean removal.
